svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="n2D8h83vl-NVEfKzLil1" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-198" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="710" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;" value="图：策略-价值网络全景（前向数据流；立方体=张量数据，圆角框=运算层）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="800" x="40" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_in" parent="1" style="shape=cube;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="输入张量
99 × 10 × 9" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="180" x="210" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trunk" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0f7ec;strokeColor=#82b366;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="主干 Trunk（提取共享特征）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="174" width="270" x="165" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_stem" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="Stem：Conv 3×3 + BN + ReLU
（99 → hidden 通道，跑 1 次）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="185" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_res" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="残差塔：N × ResidualBlock" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="230" x="185" y="258" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="res_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#777777;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="N = residual_blocks（默认 4）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="14" width="230" x="185" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_shared" parent="1" style="shape=cube;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="共享特征图（张量）
hidden × 10 × 9" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="210" y="348" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nopool" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=8;spacingRight=8;" value="全程无池化层：trunk 用 padding=1 保持 10×9 空间尺寸，不下采样；直到 head 才 Flatten 成向量。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="560" y="436" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="Policy Head
Conv 1×1 + BN + ReLU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="65" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_fc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="Flatten → Linear" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="65" y="512" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Policy logits（8100 维）
每个动作一个分值" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="210" x="65" y="584" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="Value Head
Conv 1×1 + BN + ReLU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="325" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v_fc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="Flatten → Linear → ReLU → Linear" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="325" y="512" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Tanh → Value
∈ [-1, 1]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="210" x="325" y="584" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inset" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7f7;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#555555;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="残差块内部（ResidualBlock）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="280" x="560" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_in" parent="1" style="shape=cube;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;" value="输入 x" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="100" x="650" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_c1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="Conv 3×3 + BN + ReLU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="220" x="590" y="224" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_c2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;" value="Conv 3×3 + BN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="220" x="590" y="268" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_add" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="＋" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="34" x="683" y="312" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_relu" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="ReLU → 块输出" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="220" x="590" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_in" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="n_stem"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_stem" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="n_res"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_res" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="n_shared"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_shared" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;fontColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="p_head" value="policy 头"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_shared" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.6;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="v_head" value="value 头"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="p_head" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="p_fc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="p_fc" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="p_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="v_head" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="v_fc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="v_fc" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="v_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_zoom" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_res" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1.4;dashed=1;fontColor=#777777;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="inset" value="放大其中一个块"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="rb_in" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="rb_c1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="rb_c1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="rb_c2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="rb_c2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="rb_add"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="rb_add" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="rb_relu"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_skip" edge="1" parent="1" source="rb_in" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;curved=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;dashed=1;fontColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="rb_add" value="跳连 x"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="828" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="828" y="329" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="主干（绿）= Stem + 残差塔；它输出「共享特征图」这一张量，被 policy 头（蓝）与 value 头（红）共用。mask/softmax 不在网络内，由 Evaluator 处理。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="800" x="40" y="656" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 主干（绿）= Stem + 残差塔；它输出「共享特征图」这一张量，被 policy 头（蓝）与 value 头（红）共用。mask/softmax 不在网络内，由 Evaluator 处理。
